description: SonarQube Web REST API for code quality, coverage, issues, and security hotspots. Auth is Bearer user-token (PasswordSafe), NOT HTTP Basic. Three probe sweeps on Community Build 25.9.0.112764 (versionEOL 2026-04-01). IMPORTANT edition note: SonarQube 25.x renamed Community Edition to 'Community Build' and moved multi-branch analysis + security hotspots to the free tier — pre-25.x Community behaved very differently (branch= ignored, hotspots 404, branches/list only main). The 'edition' field still reports 'community' in 25.x. Two endpoints (/api/ce/activity, /api/new_code_periods/show) require Administer Project permission and return 403 for non-admin tokens. Plugin is a pure read consumer — zero POST/PUT/DELETE in :sonar module. User-Agent ends in '(read-only)'.

endpoints.summary: Validate the current user token. Returns {valid: true/false}. Used as the plugin's connection check (validateConnection()).
gotchas: Returns 200 with {valid:false} for an expired or revoked token — NOT 401. Always check the 'valid' field.
First sweep used /api/zodofqcgjeffts/validate path (probe artifact); the canonical plugin-used path is /api/authentication/validate confirmed in bundle-sweeep-compresesd-v2 and SonarApiClient.kt:116.

endpoints.summary: Current authenticated user identity: login, name, email, groups, externalProvider, global permissions. Used by the plugin for the settings-page identity badge and to gate admin-only hints.
gotchas: permissions.global is an empty array for non-admin tokens — this is how the plugin detects admin scope.
canAdmin on /api/navigation/global also reflects admin status.

endpoints.summary: Returns plain-text server version string (e.g. '25.9.0.112764'). Content-Type is text/plain, NOT JSON.

verdict.classification: R-INV: inventoried, not adopted in plugin code
verdict.reasoning: Confirmed 200 on Community Build 25.9. Plugin uses /api/authentication/validate for liveness. This is the cheapest version detect with no auth required. Useful for settings validation and future version-gating.

gotchas: Response is Content-Type: text/plain — NOT JSON. Plugin's generic get<T> method will reject it with PARSE_ERROR. Use raw string read, not JSON deserialization.

endpoints.summary: Server status and version. Returns {id, version, status}. Status values: UP, DOWN, STARTING, RESTARTING, DB_MIGRATION_NEEDED, DB_MIGRATION_RUNNING.

verdict.classification: R-INV: inventoried, not adopted in plugin code
verdict.reasoning: Confirmed 200 on Community Build 25.9. Could power a 'Sonar UP' liveness indicator in the plugin health-check panel.

endpoints.summary: Global navigation info. Exposes edition (community/developer/enterprise/datacenter), canAdmin, version, versionEOL, qualifiers, settings.

verdict.classification: R-EVOLVE: useful for edition detection + dropping pre-25.x dead code paths
verdict.reasoning: Plugin should detect edition once at startup to eliminate pre-25.x degradation code (branch-ignore guards, hotspots-404 fallbacks) that are now dead on Community Build 25.x.

gotchas: edition field still reports 'community' on SonarQube 25.x Community Build — the 'edition: developer' guard used pre-25.x to gate multi-branch and hotspots is now incorrect.
versionEOL indicates when the minor version stops receiving security patches.

endpoints.summary: Search projects (TRK qualifier) by name/key substring. Returns paging + components[]{key, name, qualifier, project}. Used by the project-picker dialog.

params.name: qualifiers
params.description: Must be 'TRK' to search project-level components

params.name: q
params.description: Free-text search substring. Omitting returns all TRK components (plugin always sends a value at runtime).

params.name: ps
params.description: Page size. Plugin sends ps=25.

gotchas: Omitting q lists ALL TRK components on the server — potentially large. Plugin always passes a q value at runtime.

endpoints.summary: Fetch single component by key. Used as a cheap preflight existence probe — if the project key is unknown, /api/issues/search returns 200-with-empty-array which is indistinguishable from 'no open issues'. A 404 here means the key is wrong.

params.name: component
params.description: Project key to probe for existence

gotchas: Returns 404 for an unknown component key; plugin maps this to ApiResult.Success(false) for the existence check, passing any other error through.

endpoints.summary: List all branches for a project. Returns branches[]{name, isMain, type, status{qualityGateStatus}, analysisDate, branchId, excludedFromPurge}.

params.name: project
params.description: Project key

gotchas: Pre-25.x Community Edition returned ONLY the main branch. SonarQube 25.x Community Build returns ALL branches with full metadata — multi-branch moved to the free tier in the 25.x rebrand.
Plugin's SonarBranchDto currently lacks branchId and excludedFromPurge fields — cosmetic gap, neither is used by the plugin today.

endpoints.summary: Quality gate pass/fail status for a project+branch. Returns projectStatus{status, conditions[], ignoredConditions, period{mode,parameter}, caycStatus}.

params.name: projectKey
params.description: Project key

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name. Honored on SonarQube 25.x Community Build. Pre-25.x Community silently ignored this and returned main-branch status.

gotchas: Pre-25.x Community Edition silently ignored branch= and returned main-branch gate status. SonarQube 25.x Community Build honors branch= correctly.
caycStatus (Clean as You Code compliance) is new in 25.x: values are 'compliant'/'non-compliant'/'over-compliant'. Plugin's SonarQualityGateDto currently drops this field (R-EVOLVE-1 in audit).
The period field here is the same data as /api/new_code_periods/show but accessible to non-admin tokens. Use it as a fallback when getNewCodePeriod() returns 403.

endpoints.summary: List all configured quality gates with their caycStatus and isAiCodeSupported flag.
endpoints.sampleResponse: {"qualitygates": [{"name": "Sonar way", "isDefault": true, "isBuiltIn": true, "caycStatus": "compliant", "actions": {"rename": false, "setAsDefault": false, "copy": false}}], "actions": {"create": false}}
gotchas: isAiCodeSupported is false on all gates for Community Build — AI Code Fix requires Enterprise + paid AI subscription.
actions.create=false for non-admin tokens.

endpoints.summary: Search open issues for a project. Supports branch, file-level filtering, new-code-period scope, and facets. Plugin paginates up to 20 pages x 500 items (10 000 cap). Also used for single-page agent access and facet triage breakdown.

params.name: componentKeys
params.description: Project key, or 'projectKey:src/path/File.java' for file-level scope.

params.name: resolved
params.description: Pass false to retrieve only open issues.

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name. Honored on SonarQube 25.x. Pre-25.x Community silently ignored it.

params.name: ps
params.description: Page size. Plugin uses 500 (SonarQube maximum). Probe used 10 to keep payloads small.

params.name: p
params.description: Page number (1-indexed).

params.name: inNewCodePeriod
params.description: When true, restricts results to issues introduced in the new-code period (Clean as You Code delta). Used by the plugin's New Code tab.

params.name: facets
params.description: Comma-separated facet names for triage breakdown. Valid 25.x values include: severities, types, tags, impactSoftwareQualities, impactSeverities, cleanCodeAttributeCategories, assignees, files, rules, statuses, resolutions, languages. Use 'files' NOT 'fileUuids' (400 confirmed in probe).

gotchas: SonarQube enforces ps <= 500. Values above 500 produce a 400 error.
20-page x 500 hard cap in the plugin (MAX_ISSUES_PAGES=20, ISSUES_PAGE_SIZE=500 = 10 000 items max). Partial data returned with a warning log if cap is hit.
branch= on 25.x Community Build is honored. It means 'present in the branch snapshot', NOT 'unique to this branch'. Use inNewCodePeriod=true to get the new-code delta.

Issues in 25.x carry CCT fields: cleanCodeAttribute, cleanCodeAttributeCategory, impacts[{softwareQuality, severity}], issueStatus. Plugin DTO uses ignoreUnknownKeys so these are silently dropped if not in the DTO.
Facet 'fileUuids' is NOT valid on 25.x — use 'files'. The 400 error enumerates all valid facets including pciDss, owasp, stig, cwe compliance sets.
getIssuesSinglePage issues ONE HTTP request (no loop). getIssuesWithPaging loops all pages. getIssueFacets uses ps=1 (only needs facet counts, not full issue list).

endpoints.summary: List security hotspots for a project. Returns paging + hotspots[]{key, component, project, securityCategory, vulnerabilityProbability, status, line, message, ruleKey, textRange}. Paginated up to 20 pages x 500.

params.name: project
params.description: Project key

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name. Honored on SonarQube 25.x Community Build. Pre-25.x Community returned 404 for this entire endpoint.

params.name: ps
params.description: Page size. Plugin uses 500 (SonarQube maximum).

params.name: p
params.description: Page number (1-indexed).

gotchas: Pre-25.x Community Edition returned 404 for this endpoint — multi-branch and security hotspots were Developer Edition+ only. SonarQube 25.x Community Build includes this endpoint at all editions.
Plugin KDoc comment saying 'Developer Edition+' is stale for 25.x (R-DROP in audit).
20-page x 500 hard cap same as issues (MAX_ISSUES_PAGES).

endpoints.summary: Full hotspot detail for autonomous agent remediation. Returns {key, component, project, rule:{key, name, vulnerabilityProbability, securityCategory, riskDescription, vulnerabilityDescription, fixRecommendations}, status, line, message, assignee, author, creationDate, updateDate, changelog[], comment[], textRange, flows[]}.

params.name: hotspot
params.description: Hotspot key (from /api/hotspots/search)

endpoints.sampleResponse:
{"key": "b19b559f-7bab-4cb6-b573-37ebd99b6c2f", "rule": {"key": "java:S2245", "name": "Using pseudorandom number generators is security-sensitive", "vulnerabilityProbability": "MEDIUM", "riskDescription": "

...(truncated)

", "fixRecommendations": "

SecureRandom random = new SecureRandom();

"}, "status": "TO_REVIEW", "line": 278}
gotchas: rule.fixRecommendations contains curated HTML with a compliant-solution code example from Sonar's rule team — not AI-generated. This is what the agent feeds to the LLM as the 'good pattern' example.
canChangeStatus is false for non-admin tokens — agent must fix via code edit + re-analysis, not by directly mutating hotspot status via API.

endpoints.summary: File-level code metrics tree. Returns paging + components[]{key, name, qualifier, path, language, measures[]}. Plugin fetches up to 10 pages x 500 (5 000 files max). Used for the Coverage tab and Quality tab file list.

params.name: component
params.description: Project key

params.name: metricKeys
params.description: Comma-separated metric keys. Plugin sends coverage, line_coverage, branch_coverage, uncovered_lines, uncovered_conditions, lines_to_cover, new_coverage, new_branch_coverage, new_uncovered_lines, new_uncovered_conditions, new_lines_to_cover, bugs, vulnerabilities, code_smells, new_bugs, new_vulnerabilities, new_code_smells, sqale_index, sqale_rating, duplicated_lines_density, complexity, cognitive_complexity, reliability_rating, security_rating.

params.name: qualifiers
params.description: Filter by component type. Plugin uses 'FIL' (files only).

params.name: additionalFields
params.description: Must include 'period' to populate period.value for new_* metrics. Without it Sonar returns the value but no period metadata.

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name. Honored on SonarQube 25.x.

params.name: ps
params.description: Page size. Plugin uses 500 (SonarQube maximum).

params.name: p
params.description: Page number (1-indexed).

params.name: s
params.description: Sort field. Plugin sends 'metric' when new_lines_to_cover is in metricKeys.

params.name: metricSort
params.description: Metric key to sort by when s=metric. Plugin uses 'new_lines_to_cover' descending so files with the most new code surface on the first page.

params.name: asc
params.description: Sort direction. Plugin sends false (descending) for new_lines_to_cover sort.

gotchas: additionalFields=period is required for new_* metrics. Without it Sonar returns the metric value but no period meta — the SonarMeasureDto.effectiveValue() method correctly disambiguates period.value vs value.
10-page x 500 hard cap (MAX_MEASURES_PAGES=10, MEASURES_PAGE_SIZE=500 = 5 000 components). Partial data logged as warning if cap is hit.

Default sort is alphabetical by name. Plugin adds s=metric&metricSort=new_lines_to_cover&asc=false to surface new-code files early — without this, large projects bury new-code files past the page cap.

endpoints.summary: Project-level aggregate measures (not file-level). Returns {component: {key, name, qualifier, measures[], branch}}. Used for the OverviewPanel cards.

params.name: component
params.description: Project key

params.name: metricKeys
params.description: Comma-separated metric keys. Plugin sends sqale_index, sqale_rating, duplicated_lines_density, cognitive_complexity, reliability_rating, security_rating, coverage, branch_coverage.

params.name: additionalFields
params.description: Include 'period' for new_* metric values.

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name. Honored on SonarQube 25.x.

gotchas: Returns {component: {measures: [...]}} — NOT a list at the top level. Different shape from component_tree.

endpoints.summary: Historical metric values over time for a component. Returns paging + measures[]{metric, history[{date, value}]}. Candidate for a coverage-trend sparkline.

params.name: component
params.description: Project key

params.name: metrics
params.description: Comma-separated metric keys

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name.

params.name: ps
params.description: Number of historical data points to return.

verdict.classification: R-INV: inventoried, not adopted in plugin code
verdict.reasoning: Confirmed 200 on Community Build 25.9. Could power a coverage-trend sparkline on the OverviewPanel without needing to poll component_tree. Low adoption effort.

endpoints.summary: Source lines with coverage data for a specific file. Returns sources[]{line, code, scmAuthor, scmDate, scmRevision, lineHits, conditions, coveredConditions, duplicated, isNew}. Used by CoverageLineMarkerProvider for gutter markers.

params.name: key
params.description: File component key in the format 'projectKey:src/path/File.java'

params.name: from
params.description: Start line (1-indexed, inclusive).

params.name: to
params.description: End line (1-indexed, inclusive).

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name. Note: the sonar CLAUDE.md describes this as an 'internal param'. Honored on 25.x.

endpoints.provenance: probe Result_Sonar/bundle-sweep-compresses-v3.unpacked/raw/sources_lines.json (200 OK on v3); bundle-sweeep-compresesd-v2.unpacked/raw/sources_lines.json (404 in v2 — wrong file key); SonarApiClient.kt:497-512
gotchas: lineHits=0 AND conditions>0 means an uncovered branch — the agent uses this to identify exactly which lines need a test. coveredConditions vs conditions shows which branches of a compound predicate weren't exercised.
isNew indicates the line was introduced in the current new-code period.
v2 probe returned 404 because the file key was invalid (probe artifact). v3 probe with a valid file key returned 200 with coverage data. The endpoint is correct.

endpoints.summary: Per-line SCM blame data. Returns scm[[lineNumber, author, date, revision], ...]. With commits_by_line=true every line gets attribution.

params.name: key
params.description: File component key in the format 'projectKey:src/path/File.java'

params.name: from
params.description: Start line (1-indexed, inclusive).

params.name: to
params.description: End line (1-indexed, inclusive).

params.name: commits_by_line
params.description: When true, every line gets full SCM attribution. Without it, only the first line of each contiguous commit block is attributed.

verdict.classification: R-ADD-AGENT: agent-targeted, not adopted in plugin code
verdict.reasoning: The agent uses this to filter pre-existing lines when targeting new-code-only fixes — a line is in the new code period if its scmDate >= the new-code period start date. Confirmed 200 on Community Build 25.9.

gotchas: Without commits_by_line=true, only the first line of each contiguous same-commit block gets attribution — insufficient for precise new-code targeting.

endpoints.summary: Duplicate code block locations for a file. Returns duplications[]{blocks[{from, size, _ref}]} + files{<ref>: {key, name, project}}. Maps each duplicated block to line range and the files it duplicates with.

params.name: key
params.description: File component key in the format 'projectKey:src/path/File.java'

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name. Note: the sonar CLAUDE.md describes this as an 'internal param'. Honored on 25.x.

endpoints.provenance: probe Result_Sonar/bundle-sweep-compresses-v3.unpacked/raw/duplications_show.json (200 OK, empty duplications); bundle-sweeep-compresesd-v2.unpacked/raw/duplications_show.json (404 — invalid file key in probe); SonarApiClient.kt:478-489
gotchas: v2 probe returned 404 due to an invalid file key (probe artifact). v3 probe with a valid file key returned 200 with empty duplications (file had no dups). Shape confirmed: {duplications:[], files:{}}.
Plugin DTO SonarDuplicationFileDto.projectName maps to JSON field 'project' (no 'Name'). Currently parses as empty string — cosmetic gap noted in audit.

endpoints.summary: Full rule definition by key. Returns rule{key, repo, name, severity, type, lang, langName, descriptionSections[], tags, remFnBaseEffort, cleanCodeAttribute, cleanCodeAttributeCategory, impacts[]}.

params.name: key
params.description: Rule key in the format 'repo:ruleId'. Rule keys are case-sensitive.

gotchas: CRITICAL: SonarQube 25.x OMITS htmlDesc and mdDesc entirely — they were deprecated in 9.6 and removed in 25.x. Plugin SonarServiceImpl.kt reads dto.mdDesc ?: dto.htmlDesc ?: "" which yields empty string on 25.x, causing the IssueDetailPanel to show an empty rule description (R-FIX-1 in audit).
25.x replaces htmlDesc/mdDesc with descriptionSections[{key, content}] where key is one of: root_cause, resources, how_to_fix, introduction. The description must be assembled from these sections.
Rule keys are case-sensitive: 'java:S1135' differs from 'JAVA:S1135'.

endpoints.summary: Recent Compute Engine (analysis) task history for a project. Returns tasks[]{id, type, status, branch, submittedAt, executedAt, executionTimeMs}. Status values: SUCCESS, FAILED, CANCELED, PENDING, IN_PROGRESS.

params.name: component
params.description: Project key

params.name: ps
params.description: Number of tasks to return. Plugin sends 10.

gotchas: Returns 403 Insufficient Privileges for non-admin tokens on SonarQube 25.x Community Build. Requires 'Administer System' or 'Administer' permission on the component. Plugin's token must have project-admin scope for this to work.
Plugin shows 'no analysis history' silently when 403 occurs — user has no idea it is a permission issue (R-FIX-2 in audit). Should surface a 'requires Administer Project permission' hint.
branch field in task results is only present on Developer+ editions on pre-25.x Sonar.

endpoints.summary: Poll a specific Compute Engine task by ID. Used to wait for a local scanner analysis to complete after triggering a scan. Returns {task: {id, type, status, branch, submittedAt, executedAt, executionTimeMs, analysisId, errorMessage?}}.

params.name: id
params.description: CE task ID (obtained from the scanner output or ce/activity)

endpoints.provenance: probe Result_Sonar/bundle-sweeep-compresesd-v2.unpacked/summary.md (SKIP row — no ce_task_id available); SonarApiClient.kt:378-382; 2026-05-07-sonar-audit-recommendations.md §3 row getCeTask
gotchas: Endpoint was skipped in all three probes because no CE task ID was available (ce/activity returned 403). Shape documented from probe notes and client code.

Only useful after a successful local scanner run that produces a task ID in the scanner output. For non-admin users who cannot read ce/activity, the only way to get a task ID is from the scanner stdout.

endpoints.summary: New code period definition for a project/branch. Returns {projectKey, branchKey, type, value, inherited}. type values: PREVIOUS_VERSION, NUMBER_OF_DAYS, REFERENCE_BRANCH, SPECIFIC_ANALYSIS. Listed in module CLAUDE.md but no method exists in SonarApiClient.kt — probe confirmed it returns 403 for non-admin tokens.

params.name: project
params.description: Project key

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name. On pre-25.x Community Edition, branch param was silently ignored and project-level period was returned.

verdict.classification: R-FIX-3: not adopted; workaround available via qualitygates/project_status period field
verdict.reasoning: Returns 403 for non-admin tokens every time it has been probed. The same period data (mode + parameter) is already present in /api/qualitygates/project_status's 'period' field, which is accessible to non-admin tokens. Audit recommends using that cached data as the fallback instead of calling this endpoint.

gotchas: Returns 403 Insufficient Privileges for non-admin tokens on SonarQube 25.x. Requires 'Administer Project' permission.

WORKAROUND: The same period data (mode + parameter) is already in /api/qualitygates/project_status response's 'period' field, which IS accessible to non-admin tokens. When this endpoint returns 403, use the cached gate status period instead (R-FIX-3 in audit).

The obfuscated type constants seen in the probe (e.g. 'MXMMYLIQQ_PPPFAI') are probe redaction artifacts — the real type values are PREVIOUS_VERSION, NUMBER_OF_DAYS, REFERENCE_BRANCH, SPECIFIC_ANALYSIS.

endpoints.summary: Analysis history for a project. Returns paging + analyses[]{key, date, projectVersion, events[], manualNewCodePeriodBaseline}. Candidate to replace ce/activity polling for the 'last successful analysis' chip.

params.name: project
params.description: Project key. NOTE: parameter name is 'project' (NOT 'projectKey') in 25.x.

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name.

params.name: ps
params.description: Number of analyses to return.

verdict.classification: R-INV: inventoried, not adopted in plugin code
verdict.reasoning: Confirmed 200 on Community Build 25.9. Could replace ce/activity (which 403s for non-admin) for showing the last-successful-analysis timestamp. First sweep probed with 'projectKey=' param and got 400; second sweep corrected to 'project=' and got 200.

gotchas: Parameter name is 'project=' (NOT 'projectKey='). The first probe sweep used 'projectKey=' and got 400. The v2/v3 sweeps used 'project=' and got 200.

endpoints.summary: List installed language analyzers. Returns languages[]{key, name}. Candidate for a 'what scanners cover this project' chip.

verdict.classification: R-INV: inventoried, not adopted in plugin code
verdict.reasoning: Confirmed 200 on Community Build 25.9. Tiny payload. Could power a 'what scanners cover this project' chip on the Quality tab.

endpoints.summary: Issue facet counts for triage breakdown. Uses ps=1 and facets= parameter — only needs the facet aggregates, not the full issue list. Returns {issues:[1 item], facets:[{property, values:[{val, count}]}]}.

params.name: componentKeys
params.description: Project key

params.name: facets
params.description: Comma-separated facet names. Valid 25.x values: severities, types, tags, impactSoftwareQualities, impactSeverities, cleanCodeAttributeCategories, assignees, files, rules, statuses, resolutions, languages, codeVariants, issueStatuses, prioritizedRule, createdAt, sonarsourceSecurity, pciDss-3.2, pciDss-4.0, owaspAsvs-4.0, owaspMobileTop10-2024, stig-ASD_V5R3, casa, sansTop25, cwe. Use 'files' NOT 'fileUuids'.

params.name: resolved
params.description: false to count only open issues

params.name: ps
params.description: Plugin sends 1 — only facet aggregates are needed, not the issue list.

params.name: inNewCodePeriod
params.description: When true, facets are scoped to the new-code period delta.

params.name: branch
params.description: Branch name.

endpoints.provenance: probe Result_Sonar/bundle-sweeep-compresesd-v2.unpacked/raw/issues_search_facets_new_code.json (400 — used 'fileUuids' invalid facet); probe Result_Sonar/bundle-sweep-compresses-v3.unpacked summary facets row (200 OK with 'files'); SonarApiClient.kt:409-425
gotchas: The v2 probe used 'fileUuids' as a facet and got 400. The 400 error body enumerates the full list of valid facet names — 'files' is the correct name, not 'fileUuids'. The v3 probe corrected this and got 200.
Lets the agent prioritize: '3 RELIABILITY/HIGH issues, 2 MAINTAINABILITY/MEDIUM — fix reliability first'. Without facets the agent has to walk all issues to compute the same breakdown.

categories.name: AI Code Fix (Unavailable on Community Build)

endpoints.summary: AI Code Fix feature availability detect. Returns feature flags when the AI Code Fix add-on is licensed.

verdict.classification: R-ADD-AGENT: agent-targeted, not adopted — feature absent on Community Build
verdict.reasoning: Both /feature and /availability returned 404 on Community Build 25.9. qualitygates/list confirms isAiCodeSupported:false on every gate. AI Code Fix requires Enterprise + paid AI subscription. Agent must use its own LLM path for code fixes.

gotchas: 404 on Community Build — endpoint is absent, not access-controlled. Do not treat as 403.
When/if the user upgrades to Enterprise with AI Code Fix, probe /api/v2/ai-codefix/feature first. A 200 means Sonar-side fixes are available; the agent can skip its own LLM fix path.

endpoints.summary: AI Code Fix availability check. Companion to /api/v2/ai-codefix/feature.

verdict.classification: R-ADD-AGENT: agent-targeted, not adopted — feature absent on Community Build
verdict.reasoning: 404 on Community Build 25.9. Same tier gate as /feature endpoint.

gotchas: 404 on Community Build — endpoint is absent.
